he4c710e9g260bg424fgb0bbg2804c34895ea: You tried the wine? My teacher never let me have any. I must say it is delicious.
hb2f99ba6gf4f6g493fg9fdbg012ccc2c33b1: I still have no idea what to do in Baldur's Gate. Bah. That's tomorrow's problem.
h82305238g7ea4g4ad2gad35gc91de55ed2de: Don't worry: I'm not secretly composing something for you - simply enjoying my evening.
h03bb6754g221bg43ccg962fg1f6cc4a2a02f: Your song was coming along. Then things began spinning... worry not, I shall return to it at first light!
h6c9202f3ga40dg4b8bg9372gebda4227ec36: This might be the wine talking, but I'm feeling inspired. Thinking of writing my next song - about you.
hac3d9970g976fg462bga320g960abc2255d8: But I need an angle. Any ideas?
h7144a0b2ga661g42c4g9cabg8b5c081b0602: Not really. I'm not much of a bard.
hf6d80797g352bg4d0cgaea6g064d037ebeca: Oh, come on. There must be something!
h1424a01bg9fb2g4287g8c56g288bc1c99109: How about courage? Classic song material.
h85914147g6262g4672g94dcgfa1d6dcdfbd1: Fitting. You're braver than half this camp combined. That deserves to be remembered.
h6c938d9cg28bfg44ceg9fd8g2af6e641ba06: Have you seen this body? It would be a crime not to sing about it.
hba247258g684eg4a41gb577g1397b3daeef0: Hah. As usual, getting ahead of myself. Enjoy your night, then!
hf135c347gded0g4c6ag9eb8g6b82decab4eb: If I hear my name in a song, your life is forfeit.
hf9cfc727gc9acg46abgbd66gb5320d2fbcb7: Oh... sure. Of course. Have a nice night.
ha689a25cg53c0g4ec6g994ag44d6dd30894c: Skilled as I'm sure you are, I don't need my exploits put to song.
he39eb3e8g9e67g4cd4g96deg0a1f17b04b75: Humble heroes make the best ballads. But fair - I'll not force you. Enjoy your night!
h0cf33b91g769cg4deag8ba9g8526e593b9c6: All I want is a fancy title. Maybe Goblinsbane?
ha5d87011g8c84g4800ga58fgcb75b69b1ddf: Goblinsbane... I like it. Defender of tieflings and destroyer of goblins!
h420d2238g9b35g49f6gaca9g4b2942bc41c3: A wondrous and epic tale about a wondrous and epic halfling!
he5347f6eg900bg4b24g971cg8066b1d33fd4: There's just so much. Let's start with my physical beauty and go from there.
h25c154c1g4b55g450dga5ceg01705c004f9e: 'A smile that sets the heart aglow...' You're going to love it!
hb0b633f7gf207g439fg931eg6e3c00d4bbf4: Sing of my battle spirit, and how it mirrors that of the ferocious and beloved Queen Vlaakith.
h85bae149ge2deg4226g87e4gbb20eb797691: I'm not familiar with this Vlaakith, I'm afraid.
h0058c006g6136g40c7gb519g5a00389b00e5: But if she's as ferocious as you, she must be quite impressive. I'll do my best!
hc62e9114gf6f7g43c2g9657g35750b46b39a: Just mention the legend that is the Blade of Frontiers, the hardiest hero to ever travel the Sword Coast.
h89b3fffbg78e8g4aa6g8b6cg4db174090a64: With a name like that, the song practically writes itself!
h962da064g29f1g4891g8fd4g17cc42b5df85: I'd rather hear a song about Mystra.
he0a03843g6baag4c21g9c8cg12ce0d9df7fe: I don't know any ballads about her. But I can write one for you!
h894acf1eg157bg4160g9c28g1be7b32a4d82: 'By the Weave, and light-filled touch...' You're going to love it!
h7f8a7478gb477g4adcga7fcgcc9a5519ca3e: Make it a song for everyone who fought. Couldn't have done it alone.
h2a9557ecg017eg4d66ga1edg14dd1592a488: Sing about our people. We deserve it.
h1b1be6bag2754g4378gb4f1g91624c7b61ae: After Elturel, I think you're right. Faerûn deserves to see us as we really are.
h7946da47ge443g4fd1g8808ga8dbaf270dca: Maybe a song about my mixed heritage? It's a point of pride for me.
h59f26c5ag3c03g49a9gb682g6b89ddc273c8: Absolutely! 'With a foot in two worlds, you're the force joining both... ' You're going to love it.
h3e991f64ge63dg47adg828bg2a6f26e2c3b8: Shut it. The last thing I want is some sappy song about me.
h35cc8ed9gb96cg49b2gaeccg88482a3679c7: Fine, grumpypants. Serves me right for trying to be nice.
h6c2eec63g72aag4b95gaf91gbe497ac2c31b: Sing about surface elves - and how filthy and pathetic they are.
h3c2296afgd34ag45f2g8c71g9d118575a3e7: Erm, all right - it's your song. Now what rhymes with 'dirty elf'...
h71114c04g22a3g4a6cga3d0ge834a95c668a: It's your song. I wouldn't want to influence you.
hf39c739egaf22g428bg90d4g96cd5724b4c6: Nonsense - this is collaborative! I want to hear your ideas.
h021927eeg7d22g4bd7g9e64gf7f642534b40: If I want a song about me, I'll write it myself.
h585ed777g1a68g439cg9608gf9d065af583e: Of course. I guess it was a silly idea. Have a nice night.
haf5c34a9g146fg4dcegbd05g161158f2153d: Sing about my prowess in battle.
hb78a4c68g91e5g42b2ga18fgb0090ffa1f19: Fitting. Seeing you fight makes us, makes me, feel like I'm capable of anything.
h8d5b4a66gdf13g4693gad5fg2dde526630ad: How about the goblin spines I'd ripped out with my bare hands?
h3c7aaf07ga335g485ag977dga3df8c547b0d: Oh! That's very... visceral. I might tone it down a touch, but I'll keep the intent.
h2e988489g37a1g4cd7g80a2g7292c2dbbe42: I don't deserve such praise. I serve a higher power.
h2a898c12g8001g4c54g8462g7cfffacf4a7f: Pfft. The gods have enough people singing about them. But fine - I'll do my best!
he8b79258gcb11g4445g8436gf95ace1ca060: This might be the wine talking, but I'm feeling inspired. I want to get a start on your song.
